justification: All 9 L0 changes are additive — new profiles, new fixture tools, new risk entries. No existing governance, policy, or sandbox logic is modified. Changes are required for the 3 bounded example agents to participate in the governed self-evolution pipeline. This approval covers the initial creation of these infrastructure files.
conditions: No existing governance/policy/sandbox logic may be modified without a new high-risk proposal
Any future L0 changes must follow the same high-risk proposal process
